data.title: Ethereum gas fees crash 70% to 4-year lows – What’s driving the deep drop?
data.description:
Ethereum's average gas price fell to around $0.80 per transaction from its $20-plus fee highs in 2024.
source: https://ambcrypto.com/ethereum-gas-fees-crash-70-to-4-year-lows-whats-driving-the-deep-drop/

data.title: Coinbase and Binance Add Support for New ‘InfoAI’ Altcoin KAITO
data.description:
Top crypto exchange platforms Coinbase and Binance are adding support for a new artificial intelligence (AI)-focused altcoin. In a new announcement, Coinbase says it is adding support for InfoAI altcoin Kaito (KAITO) on the Base network, the firm’s own blockchain, with an Experimental label. Binance, the world’s largest crypto exchange by volume, also added support […]
The post Coinbase and...
source: https://dailyhodl.com/2025/02/20/coinbase-and-binance-add-support-for-new-infoai-altcoin-kaito/

data.title: Monero mining malware hidden inside popular game torrents
data.description:
Hackers launched a mass infection campaign to distribute a Monero mining program that could be activated remotely. The hackers delivered the mining payload via popular game torrents and primarily targeted gamers, as gaming PCs commonly tend to have stronger processors with more than 8 cores. According to a recent report by Kaspersky, hackers launched a […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/monero-mining-malware-in-game-torrents/

data.title: Canada’s OSFI sets new crypto risk guidelines for banks as adoption surges
data.description:
Canada’s banking watchdog has released new principles designed to guide banks in managing their exposure to cryptocurrency.
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/canadas-osfi-sets-new-crypto-risk-guidelines/

data.title: Story Protocol IP Token Surges 149% In a Day—One Week After Launch
data.description:
The IP token is up 261% in the last week since Story Protocol launched its layer-1 mainnet and airdrop for early users.
source: https://decrypt.co/307135/story-protocol-ip-token-surges

The FTX founder also repeated claims the exchange was solvent but illiquid and that law firm Sullivan & Cromwell mishandled the bankruptcy.

data.title: Vitalik Buterin would rather leave crypto community than embrace blockchain casinos
data.description:
Ethereum co-founder Vitalik Buterin expressed disappointment about “moral reversal” in the crypto industry, pointing to blockchain gambling. On February 20th, Vitalik Buterin’s AMA session featured a question about his main frustrations in the crypto sector last year. In his reply, Buterin talked about some people’s criticism of Ethereum for not entirely supporting blockchain casinos.  He...
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/vitalik-buterin-blockchain-casinos/

data.title: XRP lawyer Deaton slams Sen. Warren, Trump, and Putin for Ukraine war
data.description:
John Deaton, a well-known XRP lawyer and former US Senate candidate, has criticized Elizabeth Warren, Donald Trump, and Vladimir Putin over the ongoing war in Ukraine, questioning US spending, political motives, and military strategies. His comments followed Vice President JD Vance’s post on X, where Vance claimed the war wouldn’t have started if Trump was […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/xrp-lawyer-deaton-slams-sen-warren-trump-and-putin-for-ukraine-war/

data.title: SEC Withdraws Appeal in DeFi Dealer Classification Case
data.description:
DeFi advocates celebrate as the SEC drops its appeal, halting efforts to expand securities laws to decentralized finance platforms.
source: https://cryptopotato.com/sec-withdraws-appeal-in-defi-dealer-classification-case/

data.title: Fed’s Michael Barr responds to crypto debanking concerns, says the central bank tries to be ‘straight up the middle’
data.description:
Federal Reserve Vice Chair for Supervision Barr pushed back on claims that the crypto industry is being shut out of the banking sector.
source: https://www.theblock.co/post/342512/feds-michael-barr-responds-crypto-debanking-concerns-central-bank?utm_source=rss&utm_medium=rss
